name: CalendarComponent
description:
Months: 1 = January, 12 = december.
Days: 1 = Sunday, 7 = Saturday

Calendar component used for selecting dates, typically used by the DatePicker and DateTimePicker components.
Supports the Angular forms module, enabling form validity, ngModel, etc.
```html
<fd-calendar></fd-calendar>
```

inputs.name: activeView
inputs.description: Actually shown active view one of 'day' | 'month' | 'year'

inputs.name: aggregatedYearGrid
inputs.description:
Object to customize aggregated year grid,
Row, Columns and method to display year can be modified

inputs.name: allowMultipleSelection
inputs.description:
Whether the user wants to select multiple days or multiple range dates.
If `displayWeekNumbers` is true, the user can click on the week number to mark the related row.
The user can click on week days to mark the related column.
Note: Clickable selection for week row or column does not work for range selections.

inputs.name: calType
inputs.description:
The type of calendar
'single' for single date selection
'range' for a range of dates.

inputs.name: dateRangeFormat
inputs.description:
Whether to pick the date range in month or year or days format
Day format will have a month and year including day
Month format will have year including month
Year format will have just year
Values can be 'month' for Month format, 'year' for Year format or nothing for day format

inputs.name: disableFunction
inputs.description: Function used to disable certain dates in the calendar.

inputs.name: disableRangeEndFunction
inputs.description: Function used to disable certain dates in the calendar for the range end selection.

inputs.name: disableRangeStartFunction
inputs.description: Function used to disable certain dates in the calendar for the range start selection.

inputs.name: escapeFocusFunction
inputs.description: That allows to define function that should happen, when focus should normally escape of component

inputs.name: id
inputs.description: Id of the calendar. If none is provided, one will be generated.

inputs.name: legendCol
inputs.description:
Whether to display the legend in column layout (true) or row layout (false).
Column layout is useful when legend is displayed alongside the calendar.

inputs.name: markWeekends
inputs.description: Whether user wants to mark sunday/saturday with `fd-calendar__item--weekend` class

inputs.name: nextButtonDisableFunction
inputs.description: Function used to disable next button in the calendar header.

inputs.name: previousButtonDisableFunction
inputs.description: Function used to disable previous button in the calendar header.

inputs.name: rangeHoverEffect
inputs.description:
Whether user wants to mark day cells on hover.
Works only on range mode, when start date is selected on Day View.

inputs.name: selectedDate
inputs.description: The currently selected date model in single mode.

inputs.name: selectedMultipleDateRanges
inputs.description: The currently selected date model with multiple ranges.

inputs.name: selectedMultipleDates
inputs.description: The currently selected date model in multiple mode.

inputs.name: selectedRangeDate
inputs.description: The currently selected date model with start and end in range mode.

inputs.name: showCalendarLegend
inputs.description:
Whether to show the calendar legend below the calendar.
The legend displays special day markers and their meanings.

inputs.name: showWeekNumbers
inputs.description: Whether user wants to show week numbers next to days

inputs.name: specialDaysRules
inputs.description:
Special days mark, it can be used by passing array of object with
Special day number, list 1-20 [class:`fd-calendar__item--legend-{{number}}`] is available there:
https://sap.github.io/fundamental-styles/components/calendar.html calendar special days section
Rule accepts method with D object as a parameter. ex:
`rule: (fdDate: D) => fdDate.getDay() === 1`, which will mark all sundays as special day.

inputs.name: startingDayOfWeek
inputs.description: The day of the week the calendar should start on. 1 represents Sunday, 2 is Monday, 3 is Tuesday, and so on.

inputs.name: yearGrid
inputs.description:
Object to customize year grid,
Row, Columns and method to display year can be modified

outputs.name: activeViewChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time active view is changed

outputs.name: closeCalendar
outputs.description: Event thrown every time when calendar should be closed

outputs.name: closeClicked
outputs.description: Event thrown, when close button is clicked

outputs.name: isValidDateChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time when value is overwritten from outside and throw back isValid

outputs.name: selectedDateChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time selected date in single mode is changed

outputs.name: selectedMultipleDateRangesChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time the first or last date in multiple range mode is changed.

outputs.name: selectedMultipleDatesChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time the selected dates in multiple mode are changed.

outputs.name: selectedRangeDateChange
outputs.description: Event thrown every time selected first or last date in range mode is changed

methods.name: displayNextMonth
methods.description: Function that allows to switch actual view to next month

methods.name: displayNextYear
methods.description: Function that allows to switch actual view to next year

methods.name: displayNextYearList
methods.description: Function that allows to switch actually displayed list of year to next year list

methods.name: displayNextYearsList
methods.description: Function that allows to switch actually displayed list of year to next year list

methods.name: displayPreviousMonth
methods.description: Function that allows to switch actual view to previous month

methods.name: displayPreviousYear
methods.description: Function that allows to switch actual view to previous year

methods.name: displayPreviousYearList
methods.description: Function that allows to switch actually displayed list of year to previous year list

methods.name: displayPreviousYearsList
methods.description: Function that allows to switch actually displayed list of year to previous year list

methods.name: handleActiveViewChange
methods.description:
Method that handle active view change and throws event.

Fired by calendar header component.

methods.name: handleNextArrowClick
methods.description: Function that handles next arrow icon click, depending on current view it changes month, year or list of years

methods.name: handlePreviousArrowClick
methods.description: Function that handles previous arrow icon click, depending on current view it changes month, year or list of years

methods.name: initialFocus
methods.description: Set initial focus on one of the calendar's element

methods.name: isDateRangeMonthFormat
methods.description: Whether the date range format is month

methods.name: isDateRangeYearFormat
methods.description: Whether the date range format is year

methods.name: isModelValid
methods.description: Method that provides information if model selected date/dates have properly types and are valid

methods.name: setCurrentlyDisplayed
methods.description:
Function that allows to change currently displayed month/year configuration,
which are connected to days displayed
